name: mdview-electron
description: Markdown viewer powered by mdview-core WASM

scripts.build:wasm: wasm-pack build ../mdview-core --target web --features wasm && mkdir -p wasm && cp ../mdview-core/pkg/mdview_core_bg.wasm ../mdview-core/pkg/mdview_core_bg.wasm.d.ts ../mdview-core/pkg/mdview_core.js ../mdview-core/pkg/mdview_core.d.ts ../mdview-core/pkg/package.json wasm/
scripts.dev: npm run copy:hljs && npm run copy:themes && npm run copy:mermaid && npm run build:wasm && electron .
